arts.ttl: Norwich City v Portsmouth early team and injury news as 12 out and 4 doubts
arts.sum: The fight for survival continues this afternoon as Pompey make the trip to Norwich City.

arts.ttl: John Mousinho’s revealing Portsmouth insight as cracks appear at relegation rivals Cardiff City at critical moment in Championship survival fight
arts.sum: John Mousinho lifted the lid on the positivity coursing through the Pompey camp and promised: ‘We’re relishing the moment.’

arts.ttl: Portsmouth skipper responds to flak for defensive performances as he stands up for Championship record
arts.sum: Marlon Pack stood up for his Pompey defensive record and vowed: I’ll never hide.

arts.ttl: ‘No pressure’: Matt Ritchie handed new role as Portsmouth favourite prepares for Newcastle United reunion
arts.sum: Matt Ritchie is set to take a break from Pompey’s relegation battle to focus on a new challenge.

arts.ttl: ‘Given the magnitude’: EFL pundit delivers surprise Portsmouth call against Norwich City as relegation battle continues
arts.sum: Pompey’s battle against relegation continues on Good Friday when they make the trip to Norwich City.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth keeper answers League One side's SOS ahead of Birmingham and Exeter games
arts.sum: Toby Steward has answered Crawley Town’s goalkeeping SOS.

arts.ttl: Kaide Gordon: the 'exciting' Liverpool youngster who struggled at Norwich and is now down pecking order at Portsmouth
arts.sum: Pompey loanee Kaide Gordon faces a potential reunion with former club Norwich City on Good Friday.

arts.ttl: Championship: Predictions for all 12 games on Friday
arts.sum: The Easter weekend double header in the Championship usually has major repercussions at both ends of the table and Tom McGarry is on hand to provide a score prediction for all 12 games in the second tier on Good Friday.

arts.ttl: ‘This is not good, dreading it already’: Controversial referee to take charge of critical Portsmouth Championship showdown with Watford
arts.sum: Controversial referee Sam Allison is to take charge of Pompey’s monumental Easter Monday showdown with Watford.

arts.ttl: Norwich City v Portsmouth: Jordan Cross' predicted line-up with 2 changes for critical Championship clash
arts.sum: It’s the weekend which could potentially decide Pompey’s Championship fate.
